title: MiniMax M2.7: Run AI Agents for $20/Month?
summary: MiniMax M2.7 is a language model service designed for cost-effective AI agent deployment, claiming 80% cost reduction versus OpenAI and DeepSeek. The video demonstrates practical applications including social media drafting, translation, API scheduling, and image generation, with integration support for agent frameworks like OpenClaw and Hermes.
